title: Celebrity Memory - 12in12 Game 1
description:
Flip cards until you find matching pictures! Celebrity Memory is a spin on the classic memory card game, with hand-drawn art and additional mechanics, all in a cute and cozy package.

The game takes you straight to the heart of Hollywood for the biggest night of the year. Experience the famous movie award show where you can watch celebrities arrive at the theater, surrounded by a swarm of reporters and paparazzi.

During the game, you flip cards to reveal the pictures from these films. If a set of flipped cards doesn't match they flip back over. The challenge lies in remembering where the matching pictures are and uncovering them until the board is cleared. 

Do you have the Celebrity Memory required to follow the story and find out which movie wins the final award? I believe do you!

All the assets for the game were made/recorded/created by one person without the help of an AI. I believe that even though it may look and sound crude it makes it more personal and real. Various imperfections and irregularities expose the artist (and it's scary!) making the player feel more connected to both the art and the artist.

This game is a part of a "12 games in 12 months" project, in which I'm making 12 distinct games available on Steam, each one taking exactly one month to make. The entire development process is streamed live on
description_short: Flip cards until you find matching pictures! Celebrity Memory is a spin on the classic memory card game, with hand-drawn art and additional mechanics, all in a cute and cozy package. This game is a part of a "12 games in 12 months" project
